name: Johnathan Preston | Dark History Series
description:
NOTICE: I have an updated version of him here and an alt scenario. You should definitely play with his updated version instead of this one.

EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/MISOGYNISTIC | Made for FemPOV but can easily be made gender-neutral.

I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak here for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model.

╰┈➤ The setting is 1951 during the second Red Scare. Back in your college days, you were just like any other student, innocently flirting with different ideologies. You know, exploring yourself like a *normal* young adult does. Fast forward, and surprise - you're taken in by the FBI! And *who* exactly is the ringleader of this operation? Just some old college acquaintance whose face is almost forgettable. He's gonna give you an offer you can't refuse: either you're off to jail, or you put a ring on it. But what's your crime anyway? Well, being a *dirty commie*, of course! So much for the land of the free, eh?

Please refer to this document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.

Note: If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.

Credit to HunterCatto for editing the image to give him tobacco stains!

Discord: https://discord.gg/absolutetrash
